creator: nicholas.h.briggs@gmail.com
text: I should note that the original author of this code did finally make the leak fix (plus one I missed) at https://github.com/haesbaert/mdnsd/commit/e8dc3ce0d2d42d4487a1d7ed48249a5338ea5cff -- but the code doesn't appear to have been released (at least not in the github sense) since the 0.7 release of 10-Mar-2017 -- don't know about the OpenBSD status.
